pods.name: Humyn Labs — Audio
pods.note: Multi-pipeline: validation, annotation, collection, account infra & data ops

items.feature: Increase the units limit for ingestion and csv download for off-platform vendors Data beign ingestion inside a project as an open pool -once a time CSV download after the units allocated to the offplatform vendor - capped at 10K Ingestion of the offplatform vendors annotation back in system - once a time
Transcription drift to be flagged in the system
Error Messages to be fixed on Quest UI and Validation system
Assigning data units to annotators - require script to auto upload audios and transcripts to vendors bucket.
New post-processing service for data delivery(cross account/ cross org/ copy of data to client bucket)
Pre-Processing related - Conversion of files in delivery format - Bring Manifest Mapping in the system
Creating Feedback Loop for a self learning tool using the changes made by annotators on the pre-annotation

teamUpdates.status: To Let Go by End of June or Mid July

teamUpdates.status: To be analysed on Egocentric testing

devsecEpics.name: Endpoint Security Rollout
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy SentinelOne to 120 endpoints, including pilot and full rollout.

devsecEpics.name: Cloud CNAPP & Workload Protection
devsecEpics.desc: Implement CNAPP and deploy agents to 143 cloud workloads for protection.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Deployment & Log Onboarding
devsecEpics.desc: Procure, deploy Splunk, and onboard prioritized security logs for analysis.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Deployment & Compliance
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy MDM across corporate devices and enforce security compliance policies.

devsecEpics.name: Build Security Operations Team
devsecEpics.desc: Hire and onboard essential security roles to establish the Security Operations team.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Complete commercial, financial, and legal procurement cycle for Splunk licensing.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Complete vendor selection and procurement cycle for the MDM solution.

devsecEpics.name: Procurement Governance & Vendor Mgmt
devsecEpics.desc: Establish structured governance for all security tool purchases and vendor management.

devsecEpics.name: Cloudflare WAF Deployment
devsecEpics.desc: Implement and tune WAF protection for critical domains (humynlabs, kgen, kratos, exlr8).

devsecEpics.name: Reduce Public Application Exposure
devsecEpics.desc: Reduce external attack surface by removing non-critical applications from public exposure.

devsecEpics.name: Investigate Multi-Cloud Anomalies
devsecEpics.desc: Perform deep threat investigation for active infections and anomalies across multi-cloud environments.

devsecEpics.name: K8s Cluster Security Posture Review
devsecEpics.desc: Perform comprehensive Kubernetes Security Posture Management review for GKE and new AWS clusters.

devsecEpics.name: Post-Migration EKS Security Review
devsecEpics.desc: Perform security validation and hardening of the new AWS EKS cluster post-migration.

devsecEpics.name: Design K8s Cluster Segregation
devsecEpics.desc: Design architecture for segregating workloads into multiple Kubernetes clusters to reduce blast radius.
